title: DriLL Resourcepack
description: Vanilla-like 128x lightweight resourcepack with NormalMap and POM support.
body:
Vanilla-like 128x lightweight resourcepack with NormalMap and POM support. Makes textures more smooth & natural with saving vanilla style.
![Reflective emerald block.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AF05eHTS/images/41df8d6faad8b1479882dd00280d630fd2591eff.png)
